content.json:
## Vaikora for O365 - Quarantine Dashboard

This workbook visualizes Microsoft 365 mailbox quarantine events written to `VaikoraO365_Quarantine_CL` by the Vaikora for O365 black-box VM. Use it to review classification volume by tenant, action breakdown, confidence distribution, and recent high-risk quarantines.

parameters.name: TenantId
parameters.label: Tenant
parameters.query:
VaikoraO365_Quarantine_CL
| where isnotempty(TenantId_s)
| summarize by TenantId_s
| project value=TenantId_s, label=TenantId_s
| take 50

parameters.name: ActionFilter
parameters.label: Action
parameters.query:
VaikoraO365_Quarantine_CL
| where isnotempty(ActionName_s)
| summarize by ActionName_s
| project value=ActionName_s, label=ActionName_s

content.query:
VaikoraO365_Quarantine_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where TenantId_s in~ ({TenantId}) or "*" in~ ({TenantId})
| where ActionName_s in~ ({ActionFilter}) or "*" in~ ({ActionFilter})
| summarize
    TotalQuarantined = count(),
    Phishing = countif(ActionId_d == 5),
    Suspected = countif(ActionId_d == 4),
    HighConfidence = countif(Confidence_d >= 0.9),
    Tenants = dcount(TenantId_s),
    RecipientsTargeted = dcount(RecipientAddress_s)
| project TotalQuarantined, Phishing, Suspected, HighConfidence, Tenants, RecipientsTargeted
content.title: Quarantine Overview

content.query:
VaikoraO365_Quarantine_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where TenantId_s in~ ({TenantId}) or "*" in~ ({TenantId})
| where ActionName_s in~ ({ActionFilter}) or "*" in~ ({ActionFilter})
| summarize
    Total = count(),
    Phishing = countif(ActionId_d == 5),
    Suspected = countif(ActionId_d == 4),
    AlmostSuspected = countif(ActionId_d == 3)
  by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Quarantine Volume Over Time

content.query:
VaikoraO365_Quarantine_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where TenantId_s in~ ({TenantId}) or "*" in~ ({TenantId})
| where ActionName_s in~ ({ActionFilter}) or "*" in~ ({ActionFilter})
| summarize Count = count() by ActionName_s
| order by Count desc
content.title: Quarantines by Action

content.query:
VaikoraO365_Quarantine_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where TenantId_s in~ ({TenantId}) or "*" in~ ({TenantId})
| where ActionName_s in~ ({ActionFilter}) or "*" in~ ({ActionFilter})
| extend ConfidenceBucket = bin(Confidence_d, 0.1)
| summarize Count = count() by ConfidenceBucket
| order by ConfidenceBucket asc
content.title: Confidence Distribution (bin=0.1)

content.json: ### Top Sender Domains and Targeted Recipients

content.query:
VaikoraO365_Quarantine_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where TenantId_s in~ ({TenantId}) or "*" in~ ({TenantId})
| where ActionName_s in~ ({ActionFilter}) or "*" in~ ({ActionFilter})
| where isnotempty(SenderDomain_s)
| summarize
    Quarantines = count(),
    AvgConfidence = round(avg(Confidence_d), 2),
    PhishingCount = countif(ActionId_d == 5),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
  by SenderDomain = SenderDomain_s
| order by Quarantines desc
| take 10
content.title: Top 10 Sender Domains

content.query:
VaikoraO365_Quarantine_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where TenantId_s in~ ({TenantId}) or "*" in~ ({TenantId})
| where ActionName_s in~ ({ActionFilter}) or "*" in~ ({ActionFilter})
| where isnotempty(RecipientAddress_s)
| summarize
    Quarantines = count(),
    AvgConfidence = round(avg(Confidence_d), 2),
    PhishingCount = countif(ActionId_d == 5),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
  by Recipient = RecipientAddress_s
| order by Quarantines desc
| take 10
content.title: Top 10 Targeted Recipients

content.query:
VaikoraO365_Quarantine_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where TenantId_s in~ ({TenantId}) or "*" in~ ({TenantId})
| where ActionName_s in~ ({ActionFilter}) or "*" in~ ({ActionFilter})
| where ActionId_d in (4, 5)
| where Confidence_d >= 0.8
| project TimeGenerated, ActionName_s, Confidence_d, RiskScore_d, SubCategory_s, SenderAddress_s, SenderDomain_s, RecipientAddress_s, Subject_s, Reasoning_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Recent High-Risk Quarantines (top 50)

content.query:
VaikoraO365_Quarantine_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where TenantId_s in~ ({TenantId}) or "*" in~ ({TenantId})
| where ActionName_s in~ ({ActionFilter}) or "*" in~ ({ActionFilter})
| summarize
    Quarantines = count(),
    Phishing = countif(ActionId_d == 5),
    Suspected = countif(ActionId_d == 4),
    AvgConfidence = round(avg(Confidence_d), 2),
    RecipientsTargeted = dcount(RecipientAddress_s),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
  by TenantId = TenantId_s
| order by Quarantines desc
content.title: Quarantine Activity by Tenant
